# Document360 Review 2026: AI Features, Versioning, and Pricing

**Published:** May 11, 2026 | **Source:** WeavAI Blog | **Rating:** 8.3/10

## Summary

Independent 2026 review of Document360 covering its Eddy AI suite, MCP server integration (March 2026), versioning and branching system, and pricing structure. The review is the most comprehensive post-MCP-launch analysis available. Essential for `guides/08-document360.md` and the AI deflection section of `guides/00-platform-selection.md`.

## Key quotations / statistics

- **Eddy AI suite components (2026):** AI Writing Agent (drafts articles, FAQ lists, related article suggestions from prompts), AI Search (ChatGPT-style conversational search with semantic understanding), AI Premium (enterprise tier).
- **MCP Server** (March 2026): Claude, ChatGPT, and GitHub Copilot can connect directly to a Document360 KB and perform semantic search, read articles, create categories, write articles, update content - all honoring existing access controls.
- **Versioning system:** per-modification history, side-by-side version comparison (green/red diffs), one-click rollback, branch management for parallel product versioning (e.g., maintaining v2.x and v3.x simultaneously).
- **Pricing:** fully quote-based since August 2024 (no public prices). Three tiers: Professional (AI Writer Suite), Business (AI Writer + AI Search + MCP + 50+ language auto-translation), Enterprise (SAML SSO, RBAC, dedicated CSM + AI Premium).
- "The MCP Server integration is [a] 'cutting-edge 2026 workflow' enabling AI agents to automatically maintain the knowledge base."
- 14-day free trial available on all tiers.
- 30+ integrations on Business tier and above (Zendesk, Freshdesk, Slack).

## Annotations for stinger-forge

- Answers Command Brief Q2 (Is Document360's AI Assistant available on all paid tiers?): AI Writer Suite is on Professional+, but the conversational AI Search Suite is only on Business+. AI Premium (undefined scope) is Enterprise-only. This tiering needs to be in the platform-selection matrix.
- The MCP server integration (v12.3.1, March 2026) makes Document360 the leader for "agentic KB maintenance" - AI coding agents can now push article updates directly. This is a significant differentiator for developer-heavy teams.
- Branch management for parallel product versions (v2.x and v3.x simultaneously) is the key differentiator for `guides/03-versioning.md`. Document360 is the strongest platform for multi-version KB management.
- The 50+ language auto-translation on Business tier is relevant for `guides/04-multi-language.md` - this is the most native multilingual support of the six platforms.
- Pricing opacity (quote-based since August 2024) is a drawback that must be flagged in `guides/00-platform-selection.md`. Teams cannot self-serve pricing comparisons.
